Title: Authorizes the Tovas Dovid Community Kollel, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Tovas Dovid Community Kollel, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for the 2023, 2024 and 2025 assessment rolls and all of the 2023-2024, 2024-2025 and 2025-2026 school taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing Tovas Dovid Community Kollel, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
